summary: Comprehensive testing of Maxwell Security Portfolio. All features tested successfully including admin authentication, resource CRUD operations (fixed bug), public pages, and API endpoints. The reported bug fix (Add Resource functionality using adminAPI instead of resourceAPI) has been verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - tests use unique timestamped data and clean up after themselves
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. Admin authentication uses HTTP Basic Auth with credentials from backend/.env. Resource CRUD requires admin login and navigation via in-app links (page.goto loses session state). Test data is cleaned up via API after each test.

tested_features.admin_login_flow: PASS - Login via /admin page with HTTP Basic Auth
tested_features.add_resource_functionality: PASS - Create resource dialog and API integration working
tested_features.delete_resource_functionality: PASS - Delete resource API working (tested via backend tests)
tested_features.resources_page_public: PASS - Displays resources and filtering works without login
tested_features.public_writeups_listing: PASS - Public writeups endpoint returns data
tested_features.voting_on_writeups: PASS - Vote API endpoints working with rate limiting
tested_features.comment_submission_with_challenge_token: PASS - Challenge token required for comments
